description: Xquik C# SDK for X/Twitter workflows with typed methods for tweet search, user lookup, media workflows, monitors, webhooks, posting, and bulk extractions. Not affiliated with X Corp.
rules: Install from NuGet package XTwitterScraper after it is published, or use the documented project reference workflow while registry freshness is pending.
Authenticate with the XTwitterScraperClient ApiKey option or X_TWITTER_SCRAPER_API_KEY environment variable.
Use README.md first for install, authentication, first request, retries, errors, raw responses, and common workflows.
Use src/Directory.Build.props for package tags, license, project URL, repository URL, target frameworks, and package metadata.
Use src/XTwitterScraper/Services and src/XTwitterScraper/Models for generated C# method names and typed request parameters.
Use src/XTwitterScraper/Services/X/TweetService.cs and src/XTwitterScraper/Models/X/Tweets for tweet search, posting, replies, retweets, likes, and tweet retrieval workflows.

Use src/XTwitterScraper/Services/X/MediaService.cs, src/XTwitterScraper/Services/MonitorsService.cs, src/XTwitterScraper/Services/WebhooksService.cs, and src/XTwitterScraper/Services/ExtractionsService.cs for media, monitoring, webhook, and bulk extraction workflows.
Never expose API keys, bearer tokens, webhook signing values, user credentials, or local runtime secrets in examples, logs, or commits.
